name: ai-analysis-workflow
description: Machine-readable AI analysis workflow definition — receive extraction data, normalize, analyze, generate structured output, and return results to Layer 3.

url.description: Target URL of the page being analyzed

html.description: Raw HTML content from Layer 4 extraction

structuredData.description: JSON-LD and microdata from the page

networkData.description: API endpoints and embedded JSON from network analysis

steps.name: Receive Extraction Data
steps.description: Accept raw extraction output from Layer 4 and validate input structure

steps.name: Validate Extraction Completeness
steps.description: Assess extraction completeness — check for missing fields, empty content, insufficient data

steps.name: Normalize HTML
steps.description: Clean and normalize raw HTML — strip scripts, styles, comments; decode entities; normalize whitespace

steps.name: Normalize CSS
steps.description: Extract and normalize CSS data — inline styles, external stylesheets, design tokens

steps.name: Normalize Media
steps.description: Normalize media assets — deduplicate, validate URLs, categorize, extract metadata

steps.name: Extract Semantic Structure
steps.description: Extract semantic structure — title, description, headings, sections, navigation, breadcrumbs, FAQ, specifications

steps.name: Identify Reusable Components
steps.description: Identify reusable UI components — hero sections, product grids, feature blocks, testimonials, footers

steps.name: Run Gemini Analysis
steps.description: Run Gemini analyzer for normalization — extract title, description, specs, FAQ, tags, breadcrumbs
steps.input: normalized-html, validated-input.structuredData, validated-input.networkData, validated-input.existingSpecs, validated-input.existingFaq, validated-input.existingStructure

steps.name: Generate Structured JSON
steps.description: Generate structured JSON output — products.json, media-library.json, seo-library.json, schema-library.json

steps.name: Generate CMS-Ready Content
steps.description: Generate CMS-ready content — pages, brands, collections, blog posts, search index

steps.name: Generate SEO Metadata
steps.description: Generate SEO metadata for all CMS pages — meta titles, descriptions, OG tags, canonical, schema

steps.name: Return Normalized Output
steps.description: Return normalized, structured output to Layer 3 for storage and CMS generation
steps.input: gemini-result, structured-json, cms-content, seo-metadata, completeness-report, component-inventory
